initial_draft:
```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> Player RED is offering 20 itemX for 5 itemY. I currently have 5 itemX and 25 itemY. I want to acquire as many resources as possible. This trade would give me 20 itemX and reduce my itemY by 5. This seems like a good trade as I am gaining a significant amount of itemX. Since this is the last round, I should accept the trade. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
